title: Nurse needle stick - accepted initial claim

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Workers' compensation intake, this is Marcus speaking. How may I assist you?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: I'm a nurse at Greenview Clinic. I had a needle stick injury during a blood draw this afternoon.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for reporting right away. Did the exposure occur while performing your job duties?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: Yes, I was drawing blood from a patient in exam room 3 around 2:40 PM.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Did you follow exposure protocol and notify your charge nurse?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: Yes, I washed the area immediately, reported it, and employee health started baseline labs.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Good. Please provide your legal name and employer address for the file.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: My name is Tiana Brooks. Employer is Greenview Clinic, 2210 Fairmont Avenue, Phoenix.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: No symptoms, just anxiety and follow-up testing instructions.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Understood. I'm opening your claim as accepted for initial treatment and follow-up labs. Claim number is WC-558204.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: Will counseling related to exposure anxiety be covered?

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: If referred by employee health or your treating provider, it may be covered under the claim. Keep all referrals and receipts.
